title: cotyliscus niloticus
intro: Cotyliscus niloticus, also known as Egyptian lotus or Nile lotus, is a plant species native to Egypt and the Nile River region, belonging to the Nymphaea genus of water lilies. The medicinal properties of Cotyliscus niloticus include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Cotyliscus niloticus include its use in teas, infusions, and topical creams, although its safety and efficacy for human consumption should be verified through further research.
